hero.title: My TikTok, Insta, and Twitch Content Pipeline
hero.description: Pass through the valves to unlock your perfect content workflow...

workflows.summary: Capture stream moments, shape them into vertical clips, then ship them across Shorts, Reels, and TikTok.

stages.title: Trend / Game Priority
stages.description: Open your game shortlist, trend notes, and clip-worthy formats.

stages.title: Stream / Record Session
stages.description: Launch your stream setup, overlays, and recording checklist.

stages.title: Review Raw Moments
stages.description: Open rough highlights, timestamps, and shortlist candidate clips.

stages.title: Vertical Clip Edit
stages.description: Jump into your editing workspace for captions, crops, and pacing.

stages.title: Caption + Metadata
stages.description: Hook line, title, keywords, platform copy, and tags.

stages.title: Publish + Analytics
stages.description: Upload, schedule, and review retention / CTR / saves / shares.

workflows.summary: Turn prior artwork and motion pieces into loops, process clips, breakdowns, and polished short-form posts.

stages.title: Asset Pick / Theme
stages.description: Choose the artwork, motion loop, or breakdown concept to feature.

stages.title: Hook / Framing
stages.description: Decide whether the post is a reveal, process, loop, or before/after.

stages.title: Assemble / Animate
stages.description: Open the project file and move into build or cleanup mode.

stages.title: Sound / Sync
stages.description: Pair with approved audio, timing beats, or ambient design.

stages.title: Export Variants
stages.description: Create TikTok / Reels / Shorts versions with correct sizing and burn-ins.

stages.title: Post + Review
stages.description: Publish and compare saves, watch time, comments, and follows.

workflows.summary: Build cinematic or anime edits from idea to final post, with a dedicated progress lane for clip-by-clip edit status.

stages.title: Generate Clip Search Queries
stages.description: Open your prompt bank for search phrases, moods, and source targets.

stages.title: Source Intake
stages.description: Pull in locally owned, licensed, or otherwise authorized footage assets.

stages.title: Audio Selection
stages.description: Choose approved music / audio that you are licensed to use.

stages.title: Main Edit Project
stages.description: Open your edit timeline and asset bin for the current short.

stages.title: Kanban / Clip Progress
stages.description: Track Clip01 Edited, Clip02 Edited, export status, and ready-to-post state.

stages.title: Caption + Publish
stages.description: Finalize copy, export, and platform uploads.

filmKanban.title: GOOB Entertainment clip progress board
filmKanban.description: This stores your checkbox state in local storage so the browser remembers progress.

footerCards.title: Replace the placeholder links
footerCards.text: Swap every placeholder URL with the real URL for your Notion pages, Trello boards, folders, docs, or published tools.

footerCards.title: Keep it compliant
footerCards.text: Use footage, music, and assets you have rights to use so the dashboard stays useful instead of becoming a copyright mousetrap.

footerCards.title: Deploy path
footerCards.text: This project is configured for GitHub Pages through GitHub Actions.
